series_metadata.series_description: File containing insurance papers of motor carriers, which includes the following: liability insurance limits, cargo insurance limits, cancellations, and surety bonds.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copy to be destroyed after image is checked for quality and completeness. ; Electronic: Maintain as long as registration is active. Once it has expired, keep for 5 years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
